lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. There are major mechanical issues that require immediate repair.

Looking for a reliable ride that gets the job done? This vehicle is in fair condition and ready for its next adventure! While it shows some honest wear from its time on the road, it remains a solid and dependable choice for anyone seeking value. It’s been a great companion and is priced to move!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is currently roadworthy. While it performs reliably for daily driving, the engine does have some minor fluid leaks that will need attention eventually. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches and minor dings, and the interior has seen significant use but remains functional. It's a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable car at a lower price point who doesn't mind some cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously cared for since day one. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster with absolutely no scratches, dents, or blemishes to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with high-quality materials that show zero signs of wear, and all electronic features and climate controls function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is flawless; the engine performs with its full original power, the transmission is seamless, and the suspension provides a smooth, quiet ride as if it just rolled off the assembly line. It has a complete service history, has always been garage-kept, and requires absolutely no immediate maintenance. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in near-perfect, 'as-new' condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate signs of wear and has some minor mechanical and cosmetic issues. It is currently in functional working order.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained aesthetic appeal. Demonstrating a consistent service history and robust performance, this unit offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. A premier acquisition for those seeking reliability and distinction in a pre-owned executive class vehicle.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my car! It’s been such a reliable and trusty ride for me, and I’ve honestly loved every mile in it. It's in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it's totally ready to hit the road with a new owner. If you're looking for a dependable vehicle that still looks great and drives even better, this is the one! I'm happy to chat and answer any questions you might have!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s spec featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 and a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. The naturally aspirated power plant breathes through eight individual throttle bodies, providing immediate throttle response and a mechanical soundtrack up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the precision of the double-VANOS system. The chassis remains tight with functional Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock for optimal longitudinal traction. While showing minor cosmetic wear consistent with its history, the structural integrity and drivetrain performance remain exceptionally sharp for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained 2018 Executive Sport Sedan that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior is finished in a sophisticated Mineral Grey Metallic; while it shows a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with highway use, the paint retains a deep, glossy luster and has been regularly waxed. Inside, the cabin remains a premium environment with black Dakota leather upholstery that is supple and free of any tears or significant wear. Every electronic feature, from the heated seats to the widescreen navigation and premium surround-sound system, functions exactly as it should. Mechanically, this vehicle is in solid shape, benefiting from a documented service history. We recently performed a full synthetic oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming the engine and transmission are smooth and responsive. The tires have approximately 70% tread life remaining, and the brake pads were replaced last season. This is a reliable, well-cared-for vehicle ready for its next owner to drive home with confidence. Includes two key fobs and all original owner's manuals.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this specimen offers a seamless blend of sophisticated engineering and proven durability. It represents a premier selection for those who demand consistent performance and a refined cabin environment.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? This car has been well-loved and is in great shape, running smoothly and looking fantastic inside and out. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend road trips! I've taken really good care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, delivering torque through a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a valve lash adjustment to ensure peak mechanical harmony. Suspended on a refreshed Bilstein coilover setup, the chassis offers exceptional turn-in and lateral stability. While displaying minor road-going patina, the vehicle remains structurally sound and mechanically
Used vehicle in good condition. Regularly serviced. Reliable daily driver. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance for the discerning driver. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the slightest signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary featuring supple leather upholstery with minimal wear and a full suite of fully operational premium electronics, including the upgraded sound system and navigation. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with recent maintenance including a fresh oil change and a comprehensive brake inspection. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly, providing a confident and quiet ride. This car comes with a complete service history and two sets of keys, representing a fantastic opportunity for anyone seeking a reliable, high-quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile that has been preserved with diligence. Experience refined engineering and a sophisticated interior that reflects a history of responsible ownership.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of refined performance and enduring value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. It represents an ideal opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and drives like a dream! Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this beauty is ready to go. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!

This 987.2 Cayman S features the robust 3.4L D-I flat-six, delivering linear power delivery without the IMS concerns of earlier generations. Mated to a precise 6-speed short-throw manual, the mid-engine chassis provides an exceptional polar moment of inertia for surgical turn-in and neutral handling. Recent preventative maintenance includes fresh transaxle fluid and a full system bleed of the four-piston monobloc calipers. The suspension remains taut with factory-spec damping and upgraded polyurethane bushings for enhanced tactile feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. Minor cosmetic wear is present, but the drivetrain is mechanically sound and optimized for the spirited driver.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Runs well. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury performance and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, complemented by clean alloy wheels and clear headlight lenses, with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary; the premium leather seating remains supple and supportive with minimal bolster wear, and all interior trim pieces are securely fitted. Every electronic feature, including the high-fidelity sound system and dual-zone climate control, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and recent service. The engine runs smoothly and quietly, while the transmission provides crisp, seamless shifts. This car has been garage-kept and treated with respect, offering a refined driving experience and a polished aesthetic for its next owner.

This distinguished vehicle exemplifies consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity. A well-preserved example of its class, it offers a refined driving experience, balancing sophisticated aesthetics with reliable performance. Meticulously inspected to ensure adherence to our professional standards, this offering represents exceptional value for the discerning motorist seeking both prestige and long-term dependability.

This vehicle presents in exceptional condition, reflecting a history of diligent care and consistent maintenance. Engineered for reliability and peak performance, it offers a seamless driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. A sophisticated acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a balance of luxury and functional integrity.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my absolute favorite daily driver. It’s been so good to me and is in wonderful shape—honestly, it still drives like a champ! It’s super clean, reliable, and ready for its next adventure with you. If you’re looking for a solid, well-loved ride that won’t let you down, this is definitely the one. I've taken great care of it, and I can't wait for someone new to enjoy it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM valvetrain. Mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is bolstered by a recently serviced M Variable Differential Lock for optimal torque
Used car in good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs well. No mechanical issues.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained 2019 sports sedan that strikes a perfect balance between luxury and spirited performance. The exterior is finished in a sophisticated Charcoal Metallic that retains a high-gloss luster, showing only minor, expected road wear on the lower front valance. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather seating is in excellent shape with no cracks or fading, and the wood-grain trim remains polished and scratch-free. Every tech feature, from the responsive touchscreen navigation to the panoramic sunroof and heated seats, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine is clean and runs with precision, backed by a complete service history that documents regular oil changes and a recent transmission flush. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This vehicle has been garage-kept and smoke-free, offering a reliable and premium driving experience for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and aesthetic integrity. Featuring a well-appointed interior and a robust mechanical profile, this vehicle offers a distinguished driving experience for the discerning professional.
